title: Part 1 -> Part 2 detection payload
description: One accepted person detection emitted by the Perception pipeline (Part 1) and POSTed to the Brain's POST /events endpoint. At least one of face_embedding / body_embedding must be present.

detection_id.description: Stable per-detection id from Part 1 (one per accepted person crop).

camera_id.description: Camera UID string, e.g. 'GATE-01'. Must exist in the cameras table.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 UTC detection time from the edge device.

detection_conf.description: Detection confidence 0.0-1.0. Below the Brain's DETECTION_CONF_THRESHOLD (0.80) => classified Unknown, no vector search.

face_embedding.description: Face embedding (length must equal EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS, default 512). Primary identity signal.

body_embedding.description: Body ReID embedding (length must equal EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS, default 512). Cross-camera fallback.

snapshot_path.description: Path/URL to the person snapshot in shared storage.

clip_path.description: Path/URL to the short clip in shared storage.
